title: Hunter vs Speedrunner
description: Minecraft plugin HunterVSSpeedrunner ver 1.20.x - lates version (1.21.x)
body:
# Hunter vs Speedrunner Plugin

## Stable Versions

-   **v1.3** --- Requires additional plugins (**not recommended**).
-   **v1.5-release** --- In my opinion, the **most stable version** with
    the **fewest bugs**. Please read the changelog.
-   **v1.81** --- A newer version.

> ⚠️ Always use the plugin version that matches your Minecraft server
> version.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Game Modes

-   If **Random Mode is OFF** --- The main goal is to **defeat the Ender
    Dragon**.
-   If **Random Mode is ON** --- You must complete a **random task**
    that is generated at server startup.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Menu Preview

[Selection and Setup Menu](https://i.ibb.co/MkhdjQFN/0605-1.gif)\
https://i.ibb.co/MkhdjQFN/0605-1.gif

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Commands

> ⚠️ Important: The start command is available **only to
> administrators**.\
> Make sure to give yourself **OP** permissions.

-   `/hunter` --- Role selection menu\
-   `/hunter start` --- Start the game\
-   `/hunter stop` --- Stop the game\
-   `/hunterreload` --- Reload the plugin\
-   `/hunterworld` --- Create or recreate the event world (execute
    immediately)

Some additional settings can be configured in `config.yml`. 
Or the same thing in the game itself

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Localization

Available languages: - Russian (RU) - English (EN)

You can also add your own localization.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Notes

-   Plugin versions **must match** your Minecraft server version.
-   Some older versions depend on additional plugins because world
    creation was not implemented manually. (This is why certain builds require extra dependencies.)
-   Please **always use the latest version** for best stability and
    support.
